mapper.select: WITH active_videos AS ( SELECT id, duration_seconds, created_at FROM videos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ), video_totals AS ( SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS total_videos, COALESCE(SUM(duration_seconds), 0)::BIGINT AS total_climbing_seconds, MAX(created_at) AS last_climbed_at FROM active_videos ), technique_counts AS ( SELECT COALESCE( jsonb_object_agg(technique, technique_count ORDER BY technique), '{}'::jsonb ) AS technique_counts FROM ( SELECT t.technique, COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS technique_count FROM active_videos v JOIN analysis_video_results r ON r.video_id = v.id CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text( COALESCE(r.final_techniques, '[]'::jsonb) ) AS t(technique) GROUP BY t.technique ) counted ) SELECT #{userId}::BIGINT AS user_id, vt.total_videos, vt.total_climbing_seconds, tc.technique_counts::TEXT AS technique_counts, vt.last_climbed_at, LOCALTIMESTAMP AS updated_at FROM video_totals vt CROSS JOIN technique_counts tc

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.final_is_dynamic = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dynamic_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.final_is_dynamic = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS static_count FROM analysis_video_results r JOIN videos v ON v.id = r.video_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} AND v.deleted_at IS NULL
